englishDefinitions: To use editing techniques to avoid or reduce the effect of poor acting or weak performance in a film.
persianTranslation: با تدوین ضعفِ بازی را پوشاندن
دورِ اجرای ضعیف را در تدوین گرفتن
examples: The editor had to edit around bad performances in several scenes.
You can often edit around bad performances with careful cuts.
They edited around bad performances to keep the scene usable.
